scope: no-training H1a audit of the physical metric induced by the active fractional-torus coordinate path; no model change, checkpoint loading, H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT

decision_rule.detected: the current fractional chart path induces a materially cell-dependent physical noise scale; this is a representation/path hypothesis only and requires a separately frozen memorization comparison before replacement
decision_rule.not_detected: do not replace the probability path; proceed with fixed-subset memorization of the active path
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot change the frozen H1a result or authorize additional seeds, H1b, tensor conditioning or later Gates.
